source: City of Toronto Sector-Based GHG Emissions Inventory / TransformTO (public headline figures, 2019 community-wide baseline)
note: City-wide aggregate (not per-zone). Buildings ≈ half of emissions and are mostly fossil-gas heating — the main decarbonization lever, complementing the clean grid.
context: Ontario grid electricity is ~38 gCO2/kWh (see generation_mix.json), so building emissions are dominated by on-site natural gas — electrification + district energy + efficiency are the highest-impact actions.
